step_rationale: Hypoxia-responsive microRNA; cardiomyocyte ischemia and early-injury marker discriminating MI.
mechanism: miR-210-3p is upregulated in response to myocardial ischemia and hypoxia, differentiating MI from other acute cardiac presentations.

references.title: Alteration of circulating miRNAs during myocardial infarction and association with lipid levels.
